name: MessageStripAlertService
description:
Service that is responsible for opening and closing message strip alerts.
This should be only created once in entire application.
Service is responsible for creating and managing the overlays for the
message strip alerts. This also manages the footer components for any
given position.

methods.name: open
methods.description: Open a message strip alert with given configuration.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Configuration for the message strip alert

methods.name: setFooterComponent
methods.description: Set the footer component for a given position.

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: The position where the footer should be displayed

parameters.name: component
parameters.description: The component type to be rendered as footer
